title: Video Presentation of Sample Preparation by Easy Extraction and Digestion (SPEED) of Mouse Liver Tissue for Shotgun Proteomics
author: Joerg Doellinger
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Sample Preparation by Easy Extraction and Digestion  ( SPEED ) is a universal method for peptide generation from various sources. Due to its detergent-free chemistry, SPEED offers some inherent benefits for bottom-up proteomics sample preparation, including improved quantitative reproducibility, simple applicability and enhanced proteome coverage for lysis-resistant sample types as well as very rapid sample processing. The video shows the preparation of mouse liver tissue using the basic SPEED protocol for crude lysate injection into a nLC-MS/MS instrument
steps_raw: Sample Preparation by Easy Extraction and Digestion  ( SPEED ) is a universal method for peptide generation from various sources.
